evidence: The paper uses Boruta feature selection on Random Forests: "This matrix was then used for selecting features based on the Boruta algorithm, with the Boruta R package applied to Random Forests." They identify 8 TEs as biomarkers: "Using a machine learning (ML) approach, we obtained eight predictive biomarkers by comparing the Converter pre vs Converter post states... producing a classification accuracy of 78%." The feature selection is validated with held-out test AUC: "70% and 30% of the samples, respectively... The generalizability of our models was validated using a five times cross-validation... The estimation of the AUC values for... (ROC curves)." Differential expression analysis corroborates the ML results: "both RNA-sequencing DE analyses and the ML approach identified TEs that correctly discriminate between the various patient groups."
